title: Vibe Coding Showcase: 12 Incredible Projects Built by Everyday People
author: KP
text:
Vibe Coding Showcase: 12 Incredible Projects Built by Everyday People
From retail managers to fund accountants, how vibe coders are shipping real products using tools like Bolt, Cursor, v0 and Lovable etc.
Update: After this edition, I shipped something meta called "Vibe Coded Showcase" — a collection of stunning apps and websites built by vibe coders worldwide. The meta part? I vibe coded the entire platform using Bolt, Supabase, and Netlify.
Hey friends! 👋
The response to my spontaneous Vibe Coding Showcase tweet has been absolutely incredible. Within a day, I’ve received 40 submissions from builders across the globe who are proving that AI is removing barriers to create and empowering more people to build and ship.
Today, I'm excited to spotlight 12 featured projects - real people building real products using AI-assisted development. I’ve also included their exact vibe coding tool kits and frameworks so we can all learn together.
These aren't just Figma files or mock ups, they are fully functional products and some of them are even generating real revenue. Unfortunately, to keep this article brief, I am only featuring 12 but I’ve decided to add rest of the submissions I’ve received into a database/directory and share that publicly soon.
But first, what strikes me most about these builders? They come from incredibly diverse backgrounds - retail management, fund accounting, UX design, marketing - yet they're all shipping functional software using cutting edge tools like Cursor, Bolt, Claude, and Lovable.
Hope this collection inspires you to jump into vibe coding :)
Let's dive into the featured stories:
1. 👶 NewMom.Help by Zeng
Vibe Coding Stack: Bolt (frontend) + Supabase
Frameworks: React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, React Router
Website: NewMom.Help
Demo: Twitter Demo
Background: Zeng works in retail management and had zero technical skills before building this support platform for new mothers. Her journey proves that domain expertise and understanding your users' pain points can be more valuable than coding experience when AI handles the technical implementation.
Links to founder socials: X
2. ☁️ AltCloud.dev by Proshanto Gupta
Vibe Coding Stack: ChatGPT (planning) + Lovable (frontend) + Bolt + Supabase
Frameworks: Node, React with Vite, Postgres
Website: AltCloud.dev
Demo: YouTube Demo
Background: Proshanto is a CTO and Full Stack Developer with 9 years of experience who runs his own dev agency. His hybrid approach of using AI for rapid prototyping while manually coding where needed showcases how seasoned professionals strategically integrate vibe coding into their workflow.
Links to founder socials: LinkedIn | X
3. ⚖️ FairOffer.AI by Hari Raghavan
Vibe Coding Stack: Zite + Airtable
Frameworks: TypeScript, Node.js
Website: FairOffer.AI
Demo: Blog Post
Background: Hari describes himself as a former "Excel monkey" and no-coder with technical PM skills. His transformation from spreadsheet warrior to shipping AI-powered tools for salary negotiation represents the ultimate vibe coding success story - solving universal problems with elegant AI solutions.
Links to founder socials: LinkedIn | X
4. 💻 Remote-Code by Zain Hoda
Vibe Coding Stack: Claude Code + Amp + Remote-Code mobile app
Frameworks: SwiftUI, Go, Swift
Website: Remote-Code.com
Demo: Twitter Demo
Background: Zain used a meta approach - building with Claude Code and Amp to get the scaffolding up, then actually used his own Remote-Code mobile app to build out the rest of the functionality. His multi-platform development tool showcases the future of mobile-first development workflows.
Links to founder socials: LinkedIn | X
5. 🎨 Prompy.me by Mo
Vibe Coding Stack: Vercel + Supabase + Google OAuth
Frameworks: Node.js, Tailwind
Website: Prompy.me
Demo: n/a
Background: Mo is a product/UI designer with design system expertise who leveraged their design background to create a beautifully crafted product. Vibe coding allowed them to handle the technical implementation they couldn't do before while maintaining their high aesthetic standards.
Links to founder socials: LinkedIn | X
6. 📈 ShiftTrader by Raymond Siu
Vibe Coding Stack: Claude Code + MySQL + Stripe
Frameworks: Laravel, Node.js, Vite, AlpineJS
Website: ShiftTrader.app
Demo: Coming soon
Background: Raymond is a developer turned Engineering Manager who builds side projects. His shift trading platform proves that experienced professionals can still ship products quickly using modern AI tools alongside their existing technical knowledge.
Links to founder socials: LinkedIn | X
7. 📚 Story Sphere by Gary Mellerick
Vibe Coding Stack: Built entirely in Bolt
Frameworks: Node, Vite
Website: Story Sphere
Demo: Coming soon
Background: Gary is a total beginner who started vibe coding just 3 months ago. His storytelling platform built entirely in Bolt represents the ultimate beginner success story, proving that anyone can learn to build with AI tools in just a few months.
Links to founder socials: X
8. 📱 Instagram DM MCP by Tanmay Jain
Vibe Coding Stack: Cursor + Claude Desktop
Frameworks: Python
Website: GitHub Repository
Demo: Twitter Demo
Background: Tanmay is a Product Manager who describes himself as "not super technical." His tool that lets Claude access Instagram DMs directly showcases how product managers can build actual developer tools, demonstrating how AI is democratizing technical implementation.
Links to founder socials: LinkedIn | X
9. 📧 From Nora by Ryan Mish
Vibe Coding Stack: FlutterFlow + N8N + Claude + Supabase + Stripe + Cloudflare + Postmark
Frameworks: Flutter
Website: FromNora.com
Demo: Twitter Demo
Background: Ryan is a recent marketing graduate who left his job at Universal to pursue his AI agent idea. His journey from marketing to shipping Flutter apps represents a complete career transformation enabled by vibe coding and the courage to build his vision.
Links to founder socials: LinkedIn | X
10. 👶 SleepingBaby.info by Balázs Szakál
Vibe Coding Stack: Cursor (450 tokens total)
Frameworks: React, Next.js, MongoDB, Auth.js, Tailwind, DaisyUI
Website: SleepingBaby.info
Demo: YouTube Video
Background: Balázs was previously a software tester and Product Owner who's now solo building since a month ago. His entire parenting app built in just 450 tokens using Cursor proves that with the right prompting, you can ship complete products incredibly efficiently.
Links to founder socials: LinkedIn | X
11. 💰 Million Dollar Page AI by Gaurabh Mathure
Vibe Coding Stack: Bolt + Supabase + Stripe + OpenAI image generation
Frameworks: React, TypeScript, Vite, Lucide React
Website: MillionDollarPage.AI
Demo: n/a
Background: Gaurabh is a UX Designer with no coding skills who recreated the legendary Million Dollar Homepage for the AI era. His complex dynamic pricing algorithms, approval systems, and payment processing - all built by a designer using Bolt - shows what's possible when design meets AI.
Links to founder socials: X
12. 📹 ViroShorts by Kamal Bisht
Vibe Coding Stack: Cursor + Supabase + Paddle
Frameworks: Astro
Website: ViroShorts.com
Demo: Twitter Demo
Background: Kamal is a fund accountant who's learning vibe coding and no-code tools. His journey from fund accounting to building video platforms shows how AI tools are enabling career transitions into tech from completely unrelated fields.
Links to founder socials: X
What I’ve noticed:
Looking across these 12 featured projects, several powerful patterns emerge:
The tools are truly working: From Cursor and Bolt to Claude Code and Lovable, builders are finding success across every major AI-assisted development platform. The ecosystem is mature enough that you can pick almost any tool and ship real products.
Vibe coders belong to all walks of life: We have retail managers, fund accountants, UX designers, marketing grads, and engineering students all shipping polished applications. Domain expertise is becoming more valuable than coding skills.
Speed is the new competitive advantage: These builders are shipping complex applications with payment processing, user authentication, and AI integrations in days, not months. Gaurabh built dynamic pricing algorithms as a designer. Zeng shipped a full platform with zero coding background.
Personal problems still make the best products: Whether it's new parent challenges (Zeng, Balázs), career transitions (Ryan, Kamal), or professional tools (Hari, Tanmay), the best vibe coding projects solve real problems the builders understand intimately.
Ready to Start Building?
If 12 people from completely different backgrounds can ship real products, so can you. The technical barrier has been obliterated - what's left is identifying the right problem and taking that first step.
What daily frustration in your life could become someone else's favorite app?
Start there. Pick Cursor, Bolt, v0, Claude Code, or Lovable. Give yourself 1 week. Ship something imperfect but functional. Join this incredible community of builders who prove that in 2025, ideas matter more than code.
PS1: Want to be featured in our next showcase? Reply here (or DM me on X) with your demo link and build story. I’m always hunting for inspiring vibe coding projects.
PS2: Many asked me explain how i’d define vibe coding and show how to build real apps. I invited my friend and vibe coding pro Conor recently on my podcast and Youtube channel. Here’s the link to our video which is a beginner-friendly resource.
